description: Income support to all landholding farmer families in the country.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year transferred directly to bank accounts.

description: Helps farmers to know their soil health and the recommended fertilizers.
benefits: Free soil nutrient analysis and crop-wise fertilizer recommendations.

description: Focuses on providing end-to-end solutions in irrigation supply chain.
benefits: Subsidies for drip/sprinkler irrigation systems (up to 55-100% depending on state).

description: Comprehensive insurance cover against failure of the crop.
benefits: Crop insurance at extremely low premium rates (1.5% - 2% for food crops, 5% for horticulture/commercial).

description: Medium/long term debt financing for post-harvest management infrastructure.
benefits: 3% interest subvention and credit guarantee up to ₹2 Crore loans.

description: Promotion of commercial organic farming.
benefits: Financial assistance of ₹50,000 per hectare for 3 years for organic inputs, certification, and marketing.

description: Pan-India electronic trading portal networking APMCs.
benefits: Transparent online trading, better price discovery, and integrated market access.

description: Agriculture Investment Support Scheme for Telangana farmers.
benefits: ₹5,000 per acre per season (₹10,000 per year) towards initial investment needs.

description: Financial assistance to farmer families including tenant farmers.
benefits: ₹13,500 per year (including PM-KISAN share) transferred to beneficiaries.

description: Farmers Group Life Insurance Scheme for Telangana farmers.
benefits: ₹5 Lakhs insurance cover for farmers aged 18 to 59 years in case of death.

description: Scheme for setting up solar pumps and grid-connected solar power plants.
benefits: Up to 60% subsidy for providing standalone solar agriculture pumps.

description: Provides farmers with timely access to credit for agricultural expenses.
benefits: Short term crop loans up to ₹3 Lakh at an effective interest rate of 4% per annum.

scheme_name: Mission for Integrated Development of Horticulture (MIDH)
description: Holistic growth of the horticulture sector encompassing fruits, vegetables, root & tuber crops, mushrooms, spices.
benefits: Capital subsidy for nurseries, greenhouses, cold storages, packhouses, and mechanized tools.

description: To increase the production of rice, wheat, pulses, coarse cereals, and commercial crops.
benefits: Assistance for seeds, nutrients, mechanization, and demonstrations.

description: Promotes agricultural mechanization to boost efficiency and crop yield.
benefits: Subsidy from 40% to 50% for purchasing tractors and modern agricultural equipment.

scheme_name: Telangana State Free Power to Agriculture
description: Provides 24x7 free power supply to the agriculture sector.
benefits: 100% free electricity for agricultural pump sets.

scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Annadata Aay SanraksHan Abhiyan (PM-AASHA)
description: Umbrella scheme aimed at ensuring remunerative prices to farmers for their produce.
benefits: Guarantees Minimum Support Price (MSP) through procurement mechanisms.

scheme_name: National Mission on Edible Oils - Oil Palm (NMEO-OP)
description: To boost domestic oilseed production and reduce import dependency.
benefits: Financial assistance for planting material, cultivation, and harvesting tools.

description: Krushak Assistance for Livelihood and Income Augmentation.
benefits: ₹10,000 per family per year for cultivation, plus livelihood support for landless farmers.

description: Price deficit financing scheme to protect farmers from price crashes.
benefits: Compensation for the difference between the Minimum Support Price (MSP) and the actual selling price in mandis.
